response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack TypeScript experience with Node.js and React in high-scale environments (Optilyz, GISCollective). His current role includes AI-agent infrastructure work with MCP, relevant to the job description. However, primary stack requirements (Nest.js, Vitest) and relational database expertise are not explicitly evidenced. His diverse stack (DLang, Java) may not align perfectly with the target technologies.
